description: Windows screen capture MCP server with display, region, and active-window capture tools.
name: io.github.ochtum/capture-screen

environmentVariables.description: Default display selector when capture_display display argument is omitted.
environmentVariables.name: CAPTURE_SCREEN_DEFAULT_DISPLAY

environmentVariables.description: Default output directory for PNG captures. Default is C:\capture_screen.
environmentVariables.name: CAPTURE_SCREEN_OUTPUT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Set 0/false/off to disable temporary hiding of overlapping Windows Terminal windows during capture.
environmentVariables.name: CAPTURE_SCREEN_HIDE_FOREGROUND_WINDOWS_TERMINAL

title: Capture Screen MCP
